arts.ttl: Galway United defeat Saints to claim first league victory of the season
arts.sum: But they did manage to fire themselves in front just five minutes later when Hickey received the ball on the edge of the box from Greg Cunningham, the midfielder got his shot off, it took a deflection off both Luke Turner and Joe Redmond but it ended up in the back of the net. Galway United: Brendan Clarke; Killian Brouder, Bobby Burns (Regan Donelon, 70), Greg Cunningham, Jeannot Esua, Robert Slevin;Patrick Hickey, David Hurley (Vincent Borden, 81), Jimmy Keohane; Moses Dyer (Cian Byrne, 70), Stephen Walsh (Max Wilson, 91).

arts.sum: Simon Adingra needs to carefully consider a potential exit from Brighton and Hove Albion for Seattle Sounders, as it may not be the smart strategic choice he thinks it is. arts.ttl: Player’s father blames board for pushing son to Brighton sooner than he wanted
arts.sum: Valentín Barco struggled for a prominent role since joining Brighton & Hove Albion from Boca Juniors in January 2024. The left-back was restricted to a limited role at Brighton in the second half of last season. Fabian Hürzeler replaced Roberto De Zerbi last summer and left the 20-year-old out of his core plans this season.
